title: manettia mitis var. rosea
intro: Manettia mitis var. rosea, also known as the pink madderwort, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Manettia mitis var. rosea include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote wound healing and soothe sore throats, among other uses.
